feed.title: YUHA👩🏻‍💻
feed.subtitle: A minimal, portfolio, sidebar, bootstrap Jekyll theme with responsive web design and focuses on text presentation.

entry.title: [Tokyo] Preparing to leave for tokyo
entry.summary: 【 To do 】 【 Change Korea Mobile Carrier Plan 】 30.01.2022 ⭕️ 스노우맨 알뜰폰 2200 【 Buy 28inch Carrier 】 20.02.2022 ⭕️ American Tourister Assurance period : ~20.02.25 【 Apply VISA 】 JEC 대행사 04.03.2022 ⭕️ Documents 사증 신청서 여권 원본 사진 1매 주민등록등본 COE 원본 COE ...

entry.title: [AWS Solution Architect] Contents & I finally got pass!

link.title: [AWS Solution Architect] Contents & I finally got pass!

entry.summary: Certification Study period 2022.01.10 ~ 2022.02.09 (30days) Materials I used Youtube video (freeCodeCamp.org, 12/24/2022, https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Ia-UEYYR44s) - AWS Lecture on 2022.01.24 - Examtopic dump (574 questions) Content Outline Module1 Design Resilient Architectures (30%) ...

entry.title: [AWS Solution Architect] Additional Info
entry.summary: CloudWatch alarm automated recovery of EC2 instance automatically stop / terminate / reboot / recover your EC2 instances. stop or terminate actions help you save money when you need longer an instance to be running. reboot and recover actions automatically reboot those instance or recover them onto...

entry.title: [AWS Solution Architect] Storage Gateway
entry.summary: Storage Gateway Introduction File Gateway Volume Gateway Stored Volume Cached Volume Tape Gateway (VTL) Cheat Sheet Reference AWS Certified Solutions Architect - Associate 2020 (PASS THE EXAM!), Youtube, uploaded by freeCodeCamp.org, 12/24/2019, https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Ia-UEYYR44s

entry.title: [AWS Solution Architect] Kinesis
